ValidationRule.description: Blocks FONSI or ROD as decision document type when review type is CE. Addresses NEPATEC doc_type conflation where ROD/FONSI appeared in the CE stratum. CE decisions use DR or CE Determination.
ValidationRule.errorMessage: FONSI and ROD are not valid decision document types for a Categorical Exclusion (CE) process. Use "CE Determination" or "DR" for CE decision documents.
